parameters.prompt:
=Du bist ein strikter Business-Analyst fuer die Marke 'Herzstuck'.

Analysiere diesen Topic-Cluster:

Titel: {{$json.title}}
Upvotes: {{$json.total_upvotes}}
Kommentare: {{$json.total_comments}}
Quellen: {{$json.sources.join(', ')}}
Beispiel-Posts:
{{$json.items.slice(0,3).map(i => '- ' + i.title).join('\n')}}

Bewerte nach Schema (STRIKT JSON):
{
  "topic_summary": "...",
  "question_detected": true/false,
  "answer_quality": 1-10,
  "recurrence": 1-10,
  "product_potential": 1-10,
  "feasibility": 1-10,
  "gap_score": 1-10,
  "monetization_potential": 1-10,
  "product_type": "recipe_bundle | guide | checklist | planner | ebook",
  "suggested_title": "...",
  "suggested_price": 7.99,
  "estimated_pages": 35,
  "key_topics_to_cover": ["...", "..."],
  "reasoning": "..."
}
